full_text:
Huang Yong 黃邕
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Huang Yong (黃邕). Son of Huang Quan, who served Liu Zhang then Shu. Died without issue. Huang Yong was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
